# Permission snapshot — @substrat-run/demo-shop

10 keys · 2 modules · 4 roles

## 1. Registry — every key a registered manifest declares

| Key | Description | Declared by |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `cart:checkout` | Create a cart, reserve stock and place an order | `@substrat-run/demo-shop` |
| `catalog:manage` | Manage products, variants and publishing | `@substrat-run/demo-shop` |
| `customer:manage` | Manage customer records | `@substrat-run/demo-shop` |
| `discount:manage` | Create and manage discount codes | `@substrat-run/demo-shop` |
| `invoicing:export` | Export an invoice basis (makes it immutable) | `@substrat-run/engine-invoicing` |
| `invoicing:read` | Read invoice bases | `@substrat-run/engine-invoicing` |
| `order:fulfil` | Advance an order from placed → fulfilled → closed | `@substrat-run/demo-shop` |
| `order:read` | Read orders (admin); portal customers hold an entity-narrowed grant | `@substrat-run/demo-shop` |
| `shop:browse` | Read the published catalogue | `@substrat-run/demo-shop` |
| `stock:manage` | Adjust stock levels | `@substrat-run/demo-shop` |

## 2. Roles — as defined by this vertical's provisioning code

Identical in every tenant. Per-tenant customisation is a runtime concern.

| Role | Permissions |
| --- | --- |
| `public` | `shop:browse` |
| `shop-admin` | `cart:checkout`, `catalog:manage`, `customer:manage`, `discount:manage`, `invoicing:export`, `invoicing:read`, `order:fulfil`, `order:read`, `shop:browse`, `stock:manage` |
| `shopper` | `cart:checkout`, `shop:browse` |
| `warehouse` | `order:fulfil`, `order:read`, `shop:browse`, `stock:manage` |

## 3. Coverage — which roles hold each key

| Key | Held by |
| --- | --- |
| `cart:checkout` | `shop-admin`, `shopper` |
| `catalog:manage` | `shop-admin` |
| `customer:manage` | `shop-admin` |
| `discount:manage` | `shop-admin` |
| `invoicing:export` | `shop-admin` |
| `invoicing:read` | `shop-admin` |
| `order:fulfil` | `shop-admin`, `warehouse` |
| `order:read` | `shop-admin`, `warehouse` |
| `shop:browse` | `public`, `shop-admin`, `shopper`, `warehouse` |
| `stock:manage` | `shop-admin`, `warehouse` |

## 4. Entity-narrowed grant shapes

Reachable WITHOUT a role, narrowed to one entity per principal. A key held by
no role in §3 but listed here is deliberate, not a gap.

| Entity type | Permissions granted per entity |
| --- | --- |
| `customer` | `order:read` |

## 5. Not covered by this artifact

- **The grants themselves** — per-principal, per-entity, minted at runtime with
  random ULIDs. Only their shapes above are representable deterministically.
- **Operator-defined roles** — roles created against a live deployment. This
  artifact covers provisioning code only.
